---
name: writer-memory
description: >
  Maintain structured memory for writing projects, characters, relationships, scenes, and themes.
  Activate when: writer memory, character memory, story bible, remember character.
argument-hint: "<writing project or memory update>"
---

# Writer Memory

Use this skill to keep creative writing context consistent across sessions.

## Workflow
1. Identify the writing project and memory category: character, relationship, location, scene, timeline, theme, style, or open question.
2. Extract only durable facts that should affect future writing.
3. Store or update the memory in a clear project-scoped artifact chosen by the user or repository conventions.
4. Resolve contradictions by asking before overwriting important canon.
5. Summarize what changed and how it should influence future scenes.

## Rules
- Do not invent canon.
- Distinguish confirmed facts from draft ideas.
- Keep private or sensitive writing notes scoped to the workspace unless the user asks otherwise.
